records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How disappointing, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How disappointing, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How disappointing, Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you use up all your energy while getting here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you use up all your energy while getting here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you use up all your energy while getting here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let your guard down...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let your guard down...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let your guard down...

records.m_Talk_ENG: just yet!
records.m_Talk_DEU: just yet!
records.m_Talk_FRA: just yet!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I get her?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I get her?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I get her?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sword that gives you access to divine power, even when you're not the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sword that gives you access to divine power, even when you're not the Antagonist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sword that gives you access to divine power, even when you're not the Antagonist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your fangs are not that bad, it seems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your fangs are not that bad, it seems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your fangs are not that bad, it seems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, even the sharpest fangs cannot pierce what it cannot reach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, even the sharpest fangs cannot pierce what it cannot reach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, even the sharpest fangs cannot pierce what it cannot reach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... Why won't my body move...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... Why won't my body move...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... Why won't my body move...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This is your end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...This is your end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...This is your end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected. So it was you, Hilde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected. So it was you, Hilde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected. So it was you, Hilde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The power that blocked me on the northern front... was you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The power that blocked me on the northern front... was you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The power that blocked me on the northern front... was you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you looking for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you looking for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you looking for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I thought you'd show up, since starting the Qliphoth Game would enable you to kill me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I thought you'd show up, since starting the Qliphoth Game would enable you to kill me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I thought you'd show up, since starting the Qliphoth Game would enable you to kill me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel said that I'd meet someone like you if I were to tamper with enough worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel said that I'd meet someone like you if I were to tamper with enough worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel said that I'd meet someone like you if I were to tamper with enough worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've... met Tammiel before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've... met Tammiel before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've... met Tammiel before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of us will perish today, so there seems no need to talk any further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One of us will perish today, so there seems no need to talk any further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One of us will perish today, so there seems no need to talk any further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let us begin. A battle just for the two of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let us begin. A battle just for the two of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let us begin. A battle just for the two of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This won't be as enjoyable as you anticipated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This won't be as enjoyable as you anticipated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This won't be as enjoyable as you anticipated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For it'll soon be over...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For it'll soon be over...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For it'll soon be over...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Valkyrie melee response focus blade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Valkyrie melee response focus blade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Valkyrie melee response focus blade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Yes, this feeling! This is what I've been waiting for!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Yes, this feeling! This is what I've been waiting for!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Yes, this feeling! This is what I've been waiting for!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you had just fought me in the beginning instead of fleeing, I wouldn't have had to go through the trouble of destroying worlds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you had just fought me in the beginning instead of fleeing, I wouldn't have had to go through the trouble of destroying worlds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you had just fought me in the beginning instead of fleeing, I wouldn't have had to go through the trouble of destroying worlds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must not let this battle drag on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must not let this battle drag on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must not let this battle drag on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to finish her with this next strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to finish her with this next strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to finish her with this next strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: HAAAAA!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: HAAAAA!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: HAAAAA!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: New Divinity energy type detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: New Divinity energy type detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: New Divinity energy type detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CSE rapidly increasing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: CSE rapidly increasing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: CSE rapidly increasing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Please evacuate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Please evacuate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Please evacuate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So it has come to this..
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So it has come to this..
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So it has come to this..

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I had made all the necessary preparations, but... it was not enough in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I had made all the necessary preparations, but... it was not enough in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I had made all the necessary preparations, but... it was not enough in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Swiftly emerge back to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Swiftly emerge back to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dimension surface will soon collapse. Swiftly emerge back to the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Evacuate... She's coming...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Evacuate... She's coming...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Evacuate... She's coming...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is... coming...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is... coming...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is... coming...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: is everything still...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: is everything still...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: is everything still...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is because you have used <color=#ffd34c>our power</color> to awaken me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is because you have used <color=#ffd34c>our power</color> to awaken me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is because you have used <color=#ffd34c>our power</color> to awaken me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... STOP...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... STOP...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... STOP...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My Hilde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My Hilde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My Hilde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: STOP IT!
records.m_Talk_DEU: STOP IT!
records.m_Talk_FRA: STOP IT!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I... fall asleep?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I... fall asleep?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I... fall asleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll arrive in half a day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll arrive in half a day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll arrive in half a day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, what are you even eating?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, what are you even eating?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, what are you even eating?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't just be your powers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't just be your powers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't just be your powers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That doesn't concern me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That doesn't concern me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That doesn't concern me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why you're so easy to read.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why you're so easy to read.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why you're so easy to read.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is because you have used <color=#ffd34c>our power</color> to awaken me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You knew not to use that power in the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, you have no choice but to use it to protect the Wolf. That is what we call fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many times it is repeated, the outcome will be the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you've raised the Wolf well this time as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Being strong enough to fight on par with Asmodeus... Her growth is not that bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No... STOP...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No... STOP...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No... STOP...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am merely taking everything away, as the rules of the game dictate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll see you again when the next Wolf is ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My Hilde.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My Hilde.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My Hilde.

root.m_Talk_ENG: STOP IT!
root.m_Talk_DEU: STOP IT!
root.m_Talk_FRA: STOP IT!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A story in which a heroine with a painful past awakens from a nightmare... Typical cliche.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not so sure if a brute female protagonist like you would be suitable for the heroine role, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I... fall asleep?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I... fall asleep?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I... fall asleep?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you're exhausted. You walked for a week straight to avoid getting caught by those Northern Union jerks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still, be careful when you have nightmares like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to help you if she really appears in front of you for shouting her name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like I saw my past, but... I can't remember what it was about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the effect of the Corrupted Area. You see, it's not far from where your memories are stored.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll arrive in half a day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll arrive in half a day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll arrive in half a day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union has tight security against access from the outside, but I'll get you in. Trust me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those bastards refused the management of the Administration. What are they doing guarding a Crevice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are saying it's for the safety of their people, but... I'm pretty sure it's for research purposes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These people even use Shadows as test subjects. So, Ground Zero's Crevice is like a paradise full of forbidden fruit to them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, what are you even eating?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, what are you even eating?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, what are you even eating?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? It's the Eternium you gave me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I got them because you said you needed them, and you're eating them now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm eating it because I want to? I need to consume it to replenish my strength to get where your memories are stored.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I do go back to the past like you said, will I be getting all of my powers back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It won't just be your powers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It won't just be your powers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It won't just be your powers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the bad memories will come flooding in too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That doesn't concern me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That doesn't concern me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That doesn't concern me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I require my powers to fulfill my duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... You haven't changed, have you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why you're so easy to read.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why you're so easy to read.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why you're so easy to read.
